A_basic_context_identifiers.branch_location: Hemet, California, 4762 West Florida Avenue, zip code 92545
A_basic_context_identifiers.conversation_summary: The call was from Dominic of HERTZ to Sheila Johnson regarding a rental vehicle authorized by State Farm. Sheila plans to pick up the vehicle today but is unsure of the exact time. The agent informs Sheila about the pickup service which is free within 30 miles if a driver is available, but Sheila decides on arranging her own transportation. They also discuss confirming the email, body shop details, and her vehicle information. Sheila was advised to present a driver's license and payment card at pickup, and to contact the location an hour in advance. The call ends cordially.

decision_points: how Sheila will get to the branch

C_time_feasibility.branch_hours_constraints: Not explicitly mentioned; however, a one-hour advance notice for vehicle pickups was required.

customer_post_call_actions: Arrange personal transport to the branch.
Contact the branch an hour before arriving.
Present a valid driver's license and payment card at pickup.
K_outcome_customer_effort.effort_burden_explanation: Medium; while the situation was navigated effectively, customer needed to make additional personal transportation arrangements and contact the branch directly for final vehicle and pickup details.
